items.name_en: LV x TM COUSSIN Small Handbag【m13233】White/Three Colors (Takashi Murakami)
items.name_cn:
LV x TM COUSSIN Small Handbag【m13233】White/Three Colors (Takashi Murakami)
This Coussin Gx small handbag is from the Louis Vuitton x Takashi Murakami Re-edition series, crafted from fluffy sheepskin to create a sleek silhouette, presented with a full Monogram pattern in the rainbow tones of Japanese artist Takashi Murakami. The bold metal chain and detachable leather shoulder strap offer multiple carrying styles.
Size: 20 x 12 x 26 cm

specs.rawTitle:
LV x TM COUSSIN Small Handbag【m13233】White/Three Colors (Takashi Murakami)
This Coussin Gx small handbag is from the Louis Vuitton x Takashi Murakami Re-edition series, crafted from fluffy sheepskin to create a sleek silhouette, presented with a full Monogram pattern in the rainbow tones of Japanese artist Takashi Murakami. The bold metal chain and detachable leather shoulder strap offer multiple carrying styles.
Size: 20 x 12 x 26 cm

items.name_en: LV x TM POCHETTE ACCESSOIRES Handbag【m13663】Black Multicolor m13404 White Multicolor (Three Colors - Takashi Murakami)
items.name_cn:
LV x TM POCHETTE ACCESSOIRES Handbag【m13663】Black Multicolor m13404 White Multicolor (Three Colors - Takashi Murakami)
This Pochette Accessoires PPXL handbag is made of coated canvas, interpreting the dynamic style of the Louis Vuitton x Takashi Murakami collaboration series with a colorful Monogram pattern. Calfskin trim and dazzling metal hardware accentuate the refined details, with a detachable shoulder strap and chain for flexible carrying.
Size: 13 x 4 x 22 cm.

Size: 13 x 4 x 22 cm.

items.name_en: M11209 Red. This Speedy Bandoulière 20 bag is from the By The Pool collection. Monogram Tiles canvas is dyed in distinctive watercolor tones, with the Circle logo cleverly centered. The compact structure fits a phone and a short wallet.

items.name_en: M11303 Pink M11672 Yellow Chip
items.name_cn:
M11303 Pink M11672 Yellow Chip
The Bloom Pouch handbag combines classic Monogram canvas with delicate leather on the sides, interpreting the inspiration of Monogram flowers with a gentle design. The compact structure can hold daily essentials like a short wallet, phone, keys, and lipstick, and features a removable chain for various carrying ways. Dimensions: 22.5*13*13cm.

items.name_en: M11429 M83546Low Key features a modern minimalist design, complemented by extremely soft and smooth calfskin and exquisite details. These include the LV embossed lock and calf hair leather lining. This carry-all style features a main compartment with a zipper for storing essentials like a phone, wallet, and keys, and an adjustable strap for waist or crossbody wear.

items.name_en: M11561 Verona Green - This Speedy Bandoulière 25 Monogram Leather handbag features soft calfskin, recreating the refined look of the canvas print with the Monogram pattern. Shiny metal hardware, lambskin lining, and a plaque together attest to Creative Director Pharrell Williams' relentless pursuit of details. 25 x 15 x 15 cm (Length x Height x Width)

items.name_en: M11734 Top-tier Original Blossom Small Tote Bag made from soft perforated calfskin, featuring a perforated LV Circle pattern and a removable woven leather LV decoration on the front. Carry it as a handbag, elbow bag, shoulder bag, or crossbody bag using the handles or the removable and adjustable leather shoulder strap. 20.0 x 20.0 x 12.5 cm (L x H x W)
items.name_cn:
M11734 Top-tier Original Blossom Small Tote Bag made from soft perforated calfskin, featuring a perforated LV Circle pattern and a removable woven leather LV decoration on the front. Carry it as a handbag, elbow bag, shoulder bag, or crossbody bag using the handles or the removable and adjustable leather shoulder strap. 20.0 x 20.0 x 12.5 cm (L x H x W)
	•	Perforated calfskin
	•	Calfskin trim
	•	Microfiber lining
	•	Metal hardware
	•	Magnetic snap closure
	•	Internal snap hook
	•	Removable zippered pocket secured by a strap
	•	Removable LV woven decoration
	•	Metal studs on the base
	•	Fits smartphone, compact wallet, keys, headphones, and lipstick
	•	Strap: Removable, adjustable
	•	Strap half-length: 52.0 cm
	•	Strap half-length adjustable to: 59.0 cm
	•	Handles: Double handles

items.name_cn:
M11969
The 'Zippy Wallet' is updated this season with Monogram Unplant leather featuring embossed Monogram patterns. The elegant silver metal hardware contrasts with the supple grained leather, making this versatile wallet very attractive. The capacity revealed upon opening the zipper, along with the easy-to-organize interior, is also appealing. It features a bill compartment, a zippered coin pocket, and 12 card slots, offering excellent practicality.
Size: 19.5 10.5 2.5.
